calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo based upon an Appeal as to Judgment on Plaintiffs claim entered 3-8-2018 against Appellant/Defendant.

Authorized representative for Plaintiff/Respondent Autoreturn appeared.

At 9:25 am, there being no appearance by Appellant Bob Kaufman, the appeal is deemed abandoned and dismissed.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk: D. Feinberg; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
